content.rendered:
Study Abroad

Study in Australia

Get a Consultation
Download Brochure
Study in Australia

why studying in the Australia is so appealing​

Thinking about studying in Australia? As the third most popular study destination worldwide, Australia is a hub for international students. Despite being a relatively small country with a population of 25.4 million (UN data, 2020), it stands as a global leader in education and is home to over 700,000 international students. According to the University College of London’s Center for Global Higher Education, Australia is expected to soon overtake the UK as the second most popular study destination, right after the United States. Notably, six of the world’s top 100 universities are located in Australia.

Diverse academic options

A wide range of degree programs and majors are offered by Australian universities.

Part-time work opportunities

Students are allowed to work part-time while studying.

English-speaking country

With no language barrier, international students find it easier to adapt.

Post-graduation visa options

Some international students can apply for a Temporary Graduate Visa, allowing them to stay and work in Australia after graduation.

Pathway to permanent residency

Graduation from an Australian university can lead to opportunities for permanent residence.

Get in Touch

Reach out now to embark on your journey to a new life overseas with the expert assistance of our committed immigration professionals

  • Building #22 Second Floor khayaban e Iqbal sector XX DHA Phase 3 Lahore
  • advisor.edu@forecastmigration.com
  • +92-3111-822226
Facebook Instagram Linkedin

Request A Quote
